items.title: Logistic regression forward pass
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  featNode["features x"]
  linNode["linear score z = wTx + b"]
  sigNode["sigmoid sigma(z)"]
  probNode["probability y_hat = P(y=1|x)"]
  threshNode["threshold 0.5 -> class label"]
  featNode --> linNode
  linNode --> sigNode
  sigNode --> probNode
  probNode --> threshNode
items.caption: Features feed a linear logit, sigmoid maps to probability, threshold converts to a discrete prediction.

items.title: Training with BCE
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  batchNode["labeled batch (x, y)"]
  fwdNode["forward: z, y_hat = sigma(z)"]
  lossNode["BCE = -y log y_hat - (1-y) log(1-y_hat)"]
  avgNode["average BCE over batch"]
  gradNode["gradients on w, b"]
  updateNode["update parameters"]
  batchNode --> fwdNode
  fwdNode --> lossNode
  lossNode --> avgNode
  avgNode --> gradNode
  gradNode --> updateNode
items.caption: Training minimizes average binary cross-entropy — canonical pairing of sigmoid output and BCE loss.

items.title: Linear decision boundary
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  spaceNode["feature space"]
  planeNode["hyperplane wTx + b = 0"]
  side0Node["wTx + b < 0 -> class 0"]
  side1Node["wTx + b > 0 -> class 1"]
  spaceNode --> planeNode
  planeNode --> side0Node
  planeNode --> side1Node
items.caption: Logistic regression is a linear classifier: one hyperplane separates regions where P(y=1|x) is above or below 0.5.
